idea.why_now: LLMs make high-quality text transformation cheap; clients expect professional proposals
idea.existing_spend_behavior: Most freelancers already pay for Notion, Google Workspace, or Bonsai ($20–$50/mo)

signal.what_they_want: One-click video testimonial collection from customers
signal.current_workaround: Sends Loom links via email, low response rate
signal.raw_text: [mock:reddit] Getting video testimonials is painful without a $200/mo tool

idea.problem: E-commerce owners manually check competitor prices every morning
idea.solution: A lightweight SaaS that monitors up to 20 competitor URLs and emails a daily price delta report
idea.why_now: Pricing parity is critical during current inflationary period; no cheap self-serve tool exists
idea.existing_spend_behavior: Merchants already pay for tools like Klaviyo, Privy, and ReConvert ($30–$100/mo each)

signal.what_they_want: One-click video testimonial collection from customers
signal.current_workaround: Sends Loom links via email, low response rate
signal.raw_text: [mock:reddit] Getting video testimonials is painful without a $200/mo tool

title: A Lightweight SaasAI
tagline: A lightweight SaaS that monitors up to 20 competitor URLs and emails a daily price delta report
validation_steps: Post in 3 niche communities where Shopify store owner earning $10k–$100k/mo hangs out
DM 20 potential users with a personalised problem framing
Offer a free 7-day trial in exchange for a 15-min onboarding call
Charge on day 8 using Stripe Payment Link

idea.problem: Solo founders struggle to collect video testimonials without expensive software
idea.solution: A one-page link customers open on mobile to record a 60-second testimonial video, no app install
idea.why_now: Video social proof is proven to increase conversions; Testimonial.to charges $50+/mo
idea.existing_spend_behavior: Founders already pay for Loom, UserEvidence, or Boast.io for similar outcomes
